prompt: Explain in three sentences why tests must run before a fix is called done.

mtp.output: Tests must run before a fix is called done to verify that the change actually resolves the reported problem without introducing new defects. Automated and regression tests also confirm that existing functionality still works after the code modification. Only after passing the relevant tests can the fix be confidently considered complete and safe to release.
